race.comment: CORMAC T (6) came off a break of 46 days when a decent fourth behind SUBARCTIC at Wyong last start. Has a career top three strike rate of 67% so he is due to perform at the fourth run back. With that last run under the belt and the blinkers going on we should see him peak for this. SUIT OF ARMOUR (9) started $2.50 but was an abject failure in a BM72 over a slightly shorter trip here last time out. Clearly a better horse than that and a subsequent trial might bring him on. One more chance. KNIGHTS ARMOUR (2) settled last and passed half the field in the straight in the 2000m Albury Cup recently. This isn't as tough and he will be cherry ripe after three runs back. STYLEBENDER (3) led all the way to win a 2400m race at this level two back at Rosehill. Finished ahead of CORMAC T at Wyong last time so his credentials are hard to fault. DE LOUVIERE (10) defeated the in-form Goofinator at Kembla last start. That form ties him in nicely.
